key_quote: The P membership claim for single-agent verification of piecewise-linear policies is not formally proved, potentially weakening the complexity-theoretic separation that is central to the paper's narrative.
rationale: The interaction race detection via happens-before analysis for MARL is acknowledged as novel. Blockers are: unproved P membership claim, HB approximation soundness uncharacterized, ReLU-only limitation, compositional decomposition unvalidated empirically, and ε-calibration error propagation unanalyzed. All depth/rigor. Category B.
